_comment: Per-phase warm-wall baseline (call#3 with TT_UNIAD_TIMING=1 TT_UNIAD_WARM_ITERS=2). With trace replay enabled by default, call#2 covers one-time capture overhead; call#3+ is the production-relevant replay timing. The gate anchors on the LAST warm call, so set WARM_ITERS>=2 to land on call#3 and match this baseline.
_variance_note: Refreshed against the squashed branch (BEV-encoder divide→multiply fix + FPN conv-prep). extract_img_feat varies 348-372 ms across runs on device 0; the abs-floor (20 ms) + percent tolerance combo gates >20 ms AND >5% regressions while tolerating that noise.
